race.comment: Tough race. WHAT A CROSS (8) doesn't win out of turn but he's a consistent operator, just finding one better in two runs before an even effort at Morphettville. Off a let up here but the stable can keep them fit and his best form has him right in the finish at each way odds. AVONVIEW (15) is going quite well albeit in easier company. He maps for every chance and could measure up at odds. MILADY (13) was okay here last time when battling away midfield. Her form prior was solid and she should be better for the run at this trip. THURMOND (3) ran a much improved race here second up when sticking on for third. He should get every chance up on speed and take plenty of running down.
